summary: Completed testing of Email Redesign feature for SR Rénovation quote system. All 12 backend tests passed (API validation + code structure verification). Frontend SendQuoteModal tested with all new features working correctly.

backend_api_tests.test_send_email_endpoint_accepts_pdf_fie: PASS - Endpoint accepts pdf_base64 and pdf_filename fields
backend_api_tests.test_public_quote_endpoint_works: PASS - Public quote endpoint returns data

backend_code_structure_tests.test_verify_footer_contact_info_in_code: PASS - Footer has phone (06 80 33 45 46), email (SrRenovation03@gmail.com), location (Jura 39), website (sr-renovation.fr)
backend_code_structure_tests.test_verify_no_price_in_email_body: PASS - No price/montant displayed in email HTML body
backend_code_structure_tests.test_verify_pdf_attachment_support_in_co: PASS - PDF attachment via Resend is implemented
backend_code_structure_tests.test_verify_model_has_pdf_fields: PASS - SendQuoteEmail model has pdf_base64 and pdf_filename optional fields

frontend_tests.send_quote_modal_opens: PASS - Modal opens when clicking 'Envoyer' button
frontend_tests.pdf_joint_automatiquement_indicator: PASS - 'PDF joint automatiquement' text with paperclip icon present
frontend_tests.default_subject_format: PASS - 'Votre devis est prêt — SR Rénovation n°{number}' format correct
frontend_tests.message_starts_with_bonjour_firstname: PASS - Message body starts with 'Bonjour {firstName},' (dynamic client name)
frontend_tests.recipient_email_input_present: PASS - Email input populated with client email

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ SendQuoteEmail Pydantic model correctly has optional pdf_base64 and pdf_filename fields (server.py:784-789)
✅ Sender format includes company name: f"SR Renovation <{SENDER_EMAIL}>" (server.py:880)
✅ Email HTML template has gradient header from blue (#1e40af) to orange (#f97316) (server.py:823)
✅ CTA button 'Consulter mon devis' uses color #FF8C42 (server.py:835)
✅ Footer includes all contact info: phone, email, Jura (39) location, sr-renovation.fr (server.py:854-868)
✅ NO price/montant in email body - only link to view quote
✅ PDF attachment support via Resend attachments API (server.py:889-893)
✅ Frontend SendQuoteModal imports generatePDFBase64 from PDFPreview.js (SendQuoteModal.jsx:5)
✅ Frontend sends pdf_base64 and pdf_filename in request payload (SendQuoteModal.jsx:56-64)
✅ Loading states for PDF generation and sending work correctly (SendQuoteModal.jsx:168-175)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email redesign feature complete. Backend endpoint POST /api/quotes/{quote_id}/send-email accepts new fields pdf_base64 and pdf_filename for PDF attachment. Email HTML template has: 1) Blue-to-orange gradient header (#1e40af to #f97316), 2) Orange CTA button (#FF8C42), 3) Professional footer with phone/email/address/website, 4) No price shown. Frontend SendQuoteModal generates PDF client-side via generatePDFBase64 and includes in request. Default subject: 'Votre devis est prêt — SR Rénovation n°{number}'. Default message starts with 'Bonjour {firstName},'.
features_verified: Backend: POST /api/quotes/{quote_id}/send-email accepts pdf_base64 and pdf_filename
Backend: Email HTML template has gradient header (blue to orange)
Backend: Footer with contact info (phone, email, address, website)
Backend: No price/montant in email body
Backend: PDF attachment support via Resend
Frontend: SendQuoteModal generates PDF via generatePDFBase64
Frontend: Default subject format 'Votre devis est prêt — SR Rénovation n°{number}'
Frontend: 'PDF joint automatiquement' indicator with paperclip icon
Frontend: Loading states for PDF generation and sending
App loads correctly, quotes list displays, send modal opens
